headline: Adobe's $25 Billion Buyback Sends a Clear Signal. Yet Shares Remain Dirt Cheap.
summary: The creative software giant is using its enormous cash flow to scoop up its own beaten-down shares -- and the stock still looks unusually cheap.

headline: Adobe (ADBE) Finalizes Acquisition of Semrush Holdings to Power Agentic AI Brand Visibility
summary: Adobe Inc (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the best enterprise software stocks to buy right now. On April 28, Adobe finalized its acquisition of Semrush Holdings, a strategic move aimed at supporting its “Adobe CX Enterprise” agentic AI system. By integrating Semrush’s brand visibility and search intelligence with Adobe’s customer experience tools, the company aims to […]

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks We Steer Clear Of
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.
